title: Crunchy Spicy Light Jamaican Banana Crumble
description: This dish combines the sweet and spicy flavors of a traditional Jamaican banana crumble with a touch of golden syrup for a light and crispy texture suitable for a keto diet.

ingredients.name: Golden Syrup (or Maple Syrup for non-keto)
ingredients.notes: For keto, use a keto-friendly golden syrup or honey

ingredients.name: Cure (cinnamon sugar mixture)
ingredients.notes: Equal parts cinnamon and brown sugar, plus a pinch of salt

instructions: In a bowl, mix the golden syrup with the cure until well combined.
Core and slice the bananas into thin rounds. Place them in a baking dish lined with parchment paper.
Spread half of the spice mixture over the bottom layer of bananas, followed by another layer of sliced bananas.
Whisk egg whites separately until stiff peaks form. Gradually fold in almond flour and cinnamon. Add coconut oil and vanilla extract for added flavor.
Spoon the remaining spice mixture evenly on top of the banana layers.
Bake in preheated oven for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
Let it cool slightly before serving. Serve warm with a dollop of whipped cream (optional) for an extra touch.
